December 4, 2025
1.12.39
December 4, 2025

GPT-5.1-Codex Max

Introducing GPT-5.1-Codex Max in three reasoning tiers (Low, Medium, High). Low variant available at no cost to paid users for a limited time.

What changed

New Codex model tiers with free low tier promo.

  • Added GPT-5.1-Codex Max (Low, Medium, High).
  • Limited-time free access for paid users.
